name: ai2fin-tax-mcp
description: AI2Fin public Tax MCP — stateless Cloudflare Worker exposing GST/VAT + tax-rate tools over the Model Context Protocol.
comment: No dependencies: the Worker is a single self-contained file (wrangler bundles src/index.ts directly), so the Cloudflare build's `npm ci` installs nothing and the dev tools are pulled on demand via npx. This keeps a lockfile trivially valid without vendoring wrangler's tree.
